arts.ttl: Liverpool's Ibrahima Konate makes major contract admission as defender provides update on Anfield future
arts.sum: Liverpool defender Ibrahima Konate provides an update on his Anfield future after entering the final 18 months of his deal.

arts.ttl: Liverpool left facing transfer dilemma as target turns back on Anfield move
arts.sum: Liverpool are among the top clubs who admire Murillo, but the Nottingham Forest defender will not be on the move anytime soon after penning a new four-year contract

arts.ttl: Ibrahima Konaté reveals he is latest Liverpool star still to sign new contract
arts.sum: Centre-half was offered extension three months ago Salah, Van Dijk and Alexander-Arnold deals also in doubt Ibrahima Konaté is the latest Liverpool player to deliberate over his future after confirming the club’s offer of a new contract remains unsigned. The France international has 18 months on his deal and was offered an extension more than three months ago. Liverpool are in a precarious position with Mohamed Salah, Virgil van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold, all of whom are in the final six months of their contracts and free to sign a pre-contract agreement with a foreign club. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: FEATURE | Is Jonathan David Liverpool’s ideal solution to a long-term striking problem?
arts.sum: A long-standing problem on Merseyside has been the centre forward position. Under Jurgen Klopp, Roberto Firmino was almost untouchable and a vital cog in the system the German head coach…

arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes Champions League point everyone knows - but no-one dare say
arts.sum: The Liverpool boss can see his side finish top of the new-look Champions League group stage if they win against Lille on Tuesday night and Barcelona drop points against Benfica - but Arne Slot insists it really doesn't matter

arts.ttl: Champions League permutations: Possible outcomes for Arsenal, Liverpool, Man City on matchday seven
arts.sum: Sports Mole looks at the possible permutations of this week's Champions League action, including possible fates for Arsenal, Manchester City and Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot reveals Liverpool forward's injury blow with star set to be ruled out for 'weeks' ahead of Champions League clash against Lille
arts.sum: Slot confirmed that the player will be sidelined on Tuesday and he is expected to miss several weeks.

arts.ttl: Ibrahima Konate reveals he HAS received a new contract offer from Liverpool - as he opens up on playing through the pain barrier
arts.sum: Liverpool defender Ibrahima Konate admits he still has a contract issue to resolve but is demonstrating his commitment to the club by playing through pain.

arts.ttl: Liverpool recall transfer stance on Ben Doak confirmed after two rejected bids
arts.sum: Liverpool have rejected two bids from Premier League sides for Ben Doak this month

arts.ttl: Curtis Jones issues perfect reply after Mohamed Salah and Eden Hazard controversy
arts.sum: Curtis Jones has doubled down on his comments about Liverpool team-mate Mohamed Salah and Eden Hazard
